channel.title: beginsisters_official TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning Friends! Weekend vibes✨🌟🥰 What are your plans? Bon matin les amis! Maximum d’énergie pour la fin de semaine ✨🌟 Quels sont vos projets? Dc: ? Tag them if you can🫶🏻 We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters from Canada 🇨🇦 #beginsister
item.description: Good morning Friends! Weekend vibes✨🌟🥰 What are your plans? Bon matin les amis! Maximum d’énergie pour la fin de semaine ✨🌟 Quels sont vos projets? Dc: ? Tag them if you can🫶🏻 We are @Ophé and @annflo_begin dancers and sisters from Canada 🇨🇦 #beginsister
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Mood because it’s the weekend! Time to reset and recharge for the upcoming week 🙌🏻! We are sending so much energy to help you be a little extra positive today ❤️! Tell us in the comments a trend you would like to see us recreate eventually !💬💃🏻 Bonne hume
item.description: Mood because it’s the weekend! Time to reset and recharge for the upcoming week 🙌🏻! We are sending so much energy to help you be a little extra positive today ❤️! Tell us in the comments a trend you would like to see us recreate eventually !💬💃🏻 Bonne hume
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Monday Energyyy!🌟✨Starting week strong with a positive mindset! Wishing you all a great day 🫶🏻 L’énergie du lundi!🌟✨ On commence la semaine en force avec pensée positive! On vous souhaite une bonne journée🫶🏻 Dc: ? We are @Ophélie Bégin and @annflo_begin d
item.description: Monday Energyyy!🌟✨Starting week strong with a positive mindset! Wishing you all a great day 🫶🏻 L’énergie du lundi!🌟✨ On commence la semaine en force avec pensée positive! On vous souhaite une bonne journée🫶🏻 Dc: ? We are @Ophélie Bégin and @annflo_begin d
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Tuesday friends!! Outside videos are back babyy 🔥☀️ We are loving the weather currently. It feels like summer is right around the corner!!😆 Have a beautiful and sunny day 😎❤️ Bon mardi à tous !! Les vidéos a l’extérieur sont de retour 🔥☀️ On adore l
item.description: Happy Tuesday friends!! Outside videos are back babyy 🔥☀️ We are loving the weather currently. It feels like summer is right around the corner!!😆 Have a beautiful and sunny day 😎❤️ Bon mardi à tous !! Les vidéos a l’extérieur sont de retour 🔥☀️ On adore l
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Wednesday friends! Sending you positive energy for today. We are manifesting many more sunny days☀️☀️ Bon mercredi les amis! On vous envoie des ondes positives pour la journée. On manifeste pleins d’autres journées ensoleillées!☀️☀️ We are @Ophélie
item.description: Happy Wednesday friends! Sending you positive energy for today. We are manifesting many more sunny days☀️☀️ Bon mercredi les amis! On vous envoie des ondes positives pour la journée. On manifeste pleins d’autres journées ensoleillées!☀️☀️ We are @Ophélie
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Thursday friends! How is everyone feeling today?😊 We have been a little stressed and busy this week with our dance exams for school 😅 We are near the end of this semester and we can feel it ! But it’s okay we just got to remind ourselves to take day
item.description: Happy Thursday friends! How is everyone feeling today?😊 We have been a little stressed and busy this week with our dance exams for school 😅 We are near the end of this semester and we can feel it ! But it’s okay we just got to remind ourselves to take day
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Hey friends! It’s Fri-YAY!! ☀️🫶🏻Last push before the weekend. Today is about fun, dance and gratitude!! Hey les amis! C’est Vendrediiii! On donne un dernier coup avant la fin de semaine. Aujourd’hui on se focalise sur avoir du plaisir, danser et être reco
item.description: Hey friends! It’s Fri-YAY!! ☀️🫶🏻Last push before the weekend. Today is about fun, dance and gratitude!! Hey les amis! C’est Vendrediiii! On donne un dernier coup avant la fin de semaine. Aujourd’hui on se focalise sur avoir du plaisir, danser et être reco
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Saturday friends!! It’s the weekend let’s go 🙌🏻 Time to let go of the stress from the past week and enjoy some moments for yourself to recharge your batteries ! 😊 Spend some time with your loved ones or try something new! ❤️ Have an amazing weekend
item.description: Happy Saturday friends!! It’s the weekend let’s go 🙌🏻 Time to let go of the stress from the past week and enjoy some moments for yourself to recharge your batteries ! 😊 Spend some time with your loved ones or try something new! ❤️ Have an amazing weekend
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world! We had to give this fire choreo a try! We love Tyla X Zara Larsson’s new song🌸☀️🫶🏻 Dc: @Iyxd__ Bon matin tout le monde! On devait absolument apprendre cette nouvelle chorégraphie. On adore la nouvelle chanson de Tyla et Zara Larsson.🌸
item.description: Good morning world! We had to give this fire choreo a try! We love Tyla X Zara Larsson’s new song🌸☀️🫶🏻 Dc: @Iyxd__ Bon matin tout le monde! On devait absolument apprendre cette nouvelle chorégraphie. On adore la nouvelle chanson de Tyla et Zara Larsson.🌸
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Les sœurs Bégin x Méga Parc ❤️Viens nous rencontrer! Une invitation pour toi et toute ta famille! Le dimanche 17 mai 2026, on vous invite à vivre un moment unique avec nous 💛Au Méga Parc des Galeries de la Capitale à Québec! Une journée festive, immersiv
item.description: Les sœurs Bégin x Méga Parc ❤️Viens nous rencontrer! Une invitation pour toi et toute ta famille! Le dimanche 17 mai 2026, on vous invite à vivre un moment unique avec nous 💛Au Méga Parc des Galeries de la Capitale à Québec! Une journée festive, immersiv
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world!! We are still so Obsessed with this song and the choreo is too cute!🥰 Bon matin tout le monde!! On est encore obsédé par cette chanson et en plus la chorée est trop mignonne.🥰 Dc: ?? Tag them in the comments We are @Ophélie Bégin and
item.description: Good morning world!! We are still so Obsessed with this song and the choreo is too cute!🥰 Bon matin tout le monde!! On est encore obsédé par cette chanson et en plus la chorée est trop mignonne.🥰 Dc: ?? Tag them in the comments We are @Ophélie Bégin and
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: THANK YOU FOR 800 000 K FOLLOWERS!!! 🫶🏻😮 💙🤍❤️GO HABS GO 💙❤️🤍Happy Wednesday friends! We hope you are doing amazing ! If you are seeing this video this is a reminder that you control your own destiny! So live life to the fullest with a smile and with so mu
item.description: THANK YOU FOR 800 000 K FOLLOWERS!!! 🫶🏻😮 💙🤍❤️GO HABS GO 💙❤️🤍Happy Wednesday friends! We hope you are doing amazing ! If you are seeing this video this is a reminder that you control your own destiny! So live life to the fullest with a smile and with so mu
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Thursday friends!! We hope you are feeling amazing! Summer is slowly approaching and we are so excited!!🫶🏻☀️❤️ Bon jeudi à tous ! On espère que vous allez super bien ! L’été approche à grands pas et on a trop hâte ! 🫶🏻☀️ ❤️ Dc @ignite⭐️ We’re @O
item.description: Happy Thursday friends!! We hope you are feeling amazing! Summer is slowly approaching and we are so excited!!🫶🏻☀️❤️ Bon jeudi à tous ! On espère que vous allez super bien ! L’été approche à grands pas et on a trop hâte ! 🫶🏻☀️ ❤️ Dc @ignite⭐️ We’re @O
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: It’s Friday!! Good morning world we hope you had an amazing week ❤️ Starting off today with some chill vibes 😎😎 Tell us in the comments what kind of dance do you prefer us doing ? Hype energy, cooler energy, fierce energy?😆 Let us know 💬👇🏻 C’est vendredi
item.description: It’s Friday!! Good morning world we hope you had an amazing week ❤️ Starting off today with some chill vibes 😎😎 Tell us in the comments what kind of dance do you prefer us doing ? Hype energy, cooler energy, fierce energy?😆 Let us know 💬👇🏻 C’est vendredi
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: @mega_parc X Les Sœurs Bégin ❤️Viens nous rencontrer! Une invitation pour toi et toute ta famille! Le dimanche 17 mai 2026, on vous invite à vivre un moment unique avec nous 💛Au Méga Parc des Galeries de la Capitale à Québec! Une journée festive, immersi
item.description: @mega_parc X Les Sœurs Bégin ❤️Viens nous rencontrer! Une invitation pour toi et toute ta famille! Le dimanche 17 mai 2026, on vous invite à vivre un moment unique avec nous 💛Au Méga Parc des Galeries de la Capitale à Québec! Une journée festive, immersi
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Saturday world!! You guys loved this one, so had to hit it again! We always love a fun duo choreo💋💋 Bon matin tout le monde!! Vous avez tellement aimé cette danse qu’il fallait absolument qu’on la refasse! On adore une bonne chorégraphie en duo! 💋💋🥰
item.description: Happy Saturday world!! You guys loved this one, so had to hit it again! We always love a fun duo choreo💋💋 Bon matin tout le monde!! Vous avez tellement aimé cette danse qu’il fallait absolument qu’on la refasse! On adore une bonne chorégraphie en duo! 💋💋🥰
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Mother’s Day friends! ❤️ Time to tell our moms how grateful we are to have them in our lives 😊 This post is dedicated to our mom! We are so thankful to have the most supportive and extraordinary mom ever !! Thank you for everything 🫶🏻 Bonne fête des
item.description: Happy Mother’s Day friends! ❤️ Time to tell our moms how grateful we are to have them in our lives 😊 This post is dedicated to our mom! We are so thankful to have the most supportive and extraordinary mom ever !! Thank you for everything 🫶🏻 Bonne fête des
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Monday world!! We are so excited for this week! It’s finally time to perform on stage. Tell us in the comments if you want to see some behind the scene images of our shows?🥰🫶🏻 Bon lundi à tous!! Cette semaine est tellement excitante car c’est enfin
item.description: Happy Monday world!! We are so excited for this week! It’s finally time to perform on stage. Tell us in the comments if you want to see some behind the scene images of our shows?🥰🫶🏻 Bon lundi à tous!! Cette semaine est tellement excitante car c’est enfin
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Tuesday friends! Today is our last day before our week of shows, we our school, starts!! We can’t wait to perform our pieces for the first time tomorrow 🙌🏻 Do you have anything exciting happening this week? 🙃 Tell us in the comments 🫶🏻💬 Bon mardi à
item.description: Happy Tuesday friends! Today is our last day before our week of shows, we our school, starts!! We can’t wait to perform our pieces for the first time tomorrow 🙌🏻 Do you have anything exciting happening this week? 🙃 Tell us in the comments 🫶🏻💬 Bon mardi à
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning friends!❤️ We are so obsessed with this new Olivia Rodrigo song “ Drop dead “!! You should try out the dance with a friend for a good time !😆🕺 Bon matin les amis ! ❤️ On est complètement obsédé avec la nouvelle chanson d'Olivia Rodrigo, « Dro
item.description: Good morning friends!❤️ We are so obsessed with this new Olivia Rodrigo song “ Drop dead “!! You should try out the dance with a friend for a good time !😆🕺 Bon matin les amis ! ❤️ On est complètement obsédé avec la nouvelle chanson d'Olivia Rodrigo, « Dro
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world! We can’t believe this song is making a come back! Who remembers the original trend? 🤭🤣 Bon matin tout le monde! On en revient pas que cette chanson refait surface! Qui se rappelle de la chorégraphie originale?🤭🤣 Dc: @OL and @James We
item.description: Good morning world! We can’t believe this song is making a come back! Who remembers the original trend? 🤭🤣 Bon matin tout le monde! On en revient pas que cette chanson refait surface! Qui se rappelle de la chorégraphie originale?🤭🤣 Dc: @OL and @James We
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Friday friends! 🫶🏻 We finally did the Dracula trend as requested…😆 better late than never ! Today is our third show day with our dance program! It’s been so fun ❤️ We are always so grateful to be dancing on stage 🥰 Have a wonderful day 🫶🏻 Bon vendre
item.description: Happy Friday friends! 🫶🏻 We finally did the Dracula trend as requested…😆 better late than never ! Today is our third show day with our dance program! It’s been so fun ❤️ We are always so grateful to be dancing on stage 🥰 Have a wonderful day 🫶🏻 Bon vendre
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Saturday Friends!! Today, we are performing our last two shows of the school year! 🥲 We have great things coming up soon, but we are also sad that this semester ended so quickly!🫶🏻🥰 Bon Samedi tout le monde! Aujourd’hui, on performe nos deux dernier
item.description: Happy Saturday Friends!! Today, we are performing our last two shows of the school year! 🥲 We have great things coming up soon, but we are also sad that this semester ended so quickly!🫶🏻🥰 Bon Samedi tout le monde! Aujourd’hui, on performe nos deux dernier
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Sunday friends! ☀️🤗 We are so excited today because we get to meet and dance with some of you at the @Méga Parc in Quebec!! It’s going to be so fun!🙌🏻❤️ Tell us in the comments if we will see you there!💬 Have a wonderful day! ☀️ Bon dimanche à tous
item.description: Happy Sunday friends! ☀️🤗 We are so excited today because we get to meet and dance with some of you at the @Méga Parc in Quebec!! It’s going to be so fun!🙌🏻❤️ Tell us in the comments if we will see you there!💬 Have a wonderful day! ☀️ Bon dimanche à tous
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Monday world!! We are so excited for this week! The sun is finally out and we are so ready for summer season🥰🫶🏻 Bon lundi à tous!! Cette semaine est tellement excitante. Le soleil est enfin sorti et on est prête pour l’été!🥰🫶🏻 Dc: @joguroot We are
item.description: Happy Monday world!! We are so excited for this week! The sun is finally out and we are so ready for summer season🥰🫶🏻 Bon lundi à tous!! Cette semaine est tellement excitante. Le soleil est enfin sorti et on est prête pour l’été!🥰🫶🏻 Dc: @joguroot We are
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Tuesday friends! Another win for the @Canadiens Montréal yesterday!! Go habs Goooo❤️🤍💙 Tell us in the comments if you watched the game!!💬👇🏻😆 Bon mardi à tous ! Encore une victoire pour les @Canadiens de Montréal hier !! Allez les Habs ! ❤️🤍💙 Dites-n
item.description: Happy Tuesday friends! Another win for the @Canadiens Montréal yesterday!! Go habs Goooo❤️🤍💙 Tell us in the comments if you watched the game!!💬👇🏻😆 Bon mardi à tous ! Encore une victoire pour les @Canadiens de Montréal hier !! Allez les Habs ! ❤️🤍💙 Dites-n
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world!! Our cute pink sweat sets are from @Garage Clothing . 🌸💗 Today, we have something really exciting! We can’t wait for you guys to see! Bon matin tout le monde! Nos super ensemble viennent de chez Garage. Aujourd’hui, on a quelques chose
item.description: Good morning world!! Our cute pink sweat sets are from @Garage Clothing . 🌸💗 Today, we have something really exciting! We can’t wait for you guys to see! Bon matin tout le monde! Nos super ensemble viennent de chez Garage. Aujourd’hui, on a quelques chose
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Happy Thursday everyone! ❤️ We hope you are doing well ☀️ We are sending you all the best energy with this positive dance to start off your day with a smile (hopefully 🥰)😄! Today is my(annflo) last school exam of the semester, wish me luck 😆!🤞🏼Then it’s o
item.description: Happy Thursday everyone! ❤️ We hope you are doing well ☀️ We are sending you all the best energy with this positive dance to start off your day with a smile (hopefully 🥰)😄! Today is my(annflo) last school exam of the semester, wish me luck 😆!🤞🏼Then it’s o
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: Good morning world! How is everyone doing? We are so happy that the habs won the game last night!! 🏒💙🤍❤️ Bon matin tout le monde! Comment-allez-vous? On est trop contente que les Canadiens ont gagné la game de hier soir!! 🏒💙🤍❤️ Dc: ? We are @Ophélie Bégin
item.description: Good morning world! How is everyone doing? We are so happy that the habs won the game last night!! 🏒💙🤍❤️ Bon matin tout le monde! Comment-allez-vous? On est trop contente que les Canadiens ont gagné la game de hier soir!! 🏒💙🤍❤️ Dc: ? We are @Ophélie Bégin
item.author: beginsisters_official

item.title: GO HABS GO 🔵⚪🔴 Match #7 ce soir à Tampa Bay. La victoire on y croit jusqu’au bout. On envoie nos ondes positives aux Canadiens de Montréal 🙌 Partagez pour les encourager! DC beginsisters_official @Canadiens Montréal GO HABS GO 🔵⚪🔴 Game 7 tonight in Tamp
item.description: GO HABS GO 🔵⚪🔴 Match #7 ce soir à Tampa Bay. La victoire on y croit jusqu’au bout. On envoie nos ondes positives aux Canadiens de Montréal 🙌 Partagez pour les encourager! DC beginsisters_official @Canadiens Montréal GO HABS GO 🔵⚪🔴 Game 7 tonight in Tamp
item.author: beginsisters_official
